title: Panorama Screens
description: Enhance Minecraft menus by adding the rotating panorama background to most screens!
body:
Panorama Screens is a mod that enhances Minecraft screens by adding the title screen rotating panorama background. It is also compatible and tested with lots of mods and allows the player to manually add the panorama screen with untested mods.

Compatible with both forge and fabric, minecraft versions, 1.18.2 and all 1.19 versions

Features

  • High compatibility with other mods.
    Explicit compatibility with lots of mod config screen APIs (cloth-config, configured, etc) and tested in hundreds of other mods.
  • Configurable through Cloth Config.
  • Screen allow list for compatible screens/mods.
  • Screen block list for incompatible screens/mods.

Screenshots

More screenshots in the gallery!

Installation

Forge:

This mod requires Forge (Make sure to download the correct version). You can download Panorama Screens from the Modrinth, make sure to download the forge version.

  • Install Forge.
  • Drop the mod jar inside the mods folder.
  • Optionally, download and install Cloth Config to be able to access the config menu.
  • That's all!

Fabric:

This mod requires Fabric and Fabric API. You can download Panorama Screens from Modrinth, make sure to download the fabric version.

  • Install Fabric
  • Place Fabric API jar inside the mods folder.
  • Place Panorama Screens jar inside the mods folder.
  • Success!

License
